summary: Full e2e testing of HUJJAH Trivia Game iteration 2. All 22 backend tests passed. All game flows working including new features: dark radial-gradient background, animated score, QR code, secret word page, admin dashboard.

issues: Score still shows without space: '🔴 الأسود200' instead of '🔴 الأسود: 200' - same cosmetic issue from iteration 1
Secret word shows difficulty label 'سهل' in small olive/green text above the card - minor; word itself in large text is clear and readable

action_items: data-testid for tiles uses point values 200/400/600 format (tile-cat_flags-200), NOT difficulty names easy/medium/hard as stated in files_of_reference. Update documentation if needed.
Score display: add space/colon between team name and score number for readability
critical_code_review_comments: Tile data-testid format is 'tile-{catId}-{points}' (e.g. tile-cat_flags-200) not 'tile-{catId}-{difficulty}' (easy/medium/hard). files_of_reference is outdated.
Score cosmetic issue: '🔴 الأسود200' - team name and score concatenated without separator

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all flows working including new features

context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows tested: HomePage (dark radial-gradient background, حُجّة branding, العب الحين button, 7 category cards) → TeamSetup (4s animation delay) → CategorySelect (team1 then team2, disabled cats for team2) → GameBoard (6 cols, tile-{catId}-{points} testid format) → QuestionPage (75s timer, reveal, assign, back) → used tiles grayed. ولا كلمة shows QR code. /secret/{id} works on mobile 390px showing large word. Admin /admin → hujjah2024 → /admin/dashboard fully functional with categories sidebar, questions list, add/edit/delete.
rca_of_issues: No critical issues. Minor cosmetic: score display concatenates team name + score without separator.
